summary: AmmiAI Slice 1 tested end-to-end. Backend: 10/10 pytest cases pass (root, stats, ingredients list/get/404, recipes list/filter/get/404, meal-rules). Frontend: home screen renders welcome + Tamil subtitle, all 4 counter cards show correct values (69 Ingredients / 67 Recipes / 1 Meal Rules / 8 Categories), category breakdown lists all 8 categories with correct counts, header background is #143D22 (rgb(20,61,34)) on rice-white body, and bottom nav has exactly 5 tabs in the required order — Home, Pantry, Plan, Calendar, Grocery — each navigating to its respective screen with English + Tamil empty state.

react_native_issues.issue: React Native Web logs deprecation warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use 'boxShadow'. Non-blocking on native, but noisy on web. Consider Platform.select to emit boxShadow for web.
React Native Web logs deprecation warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Coming from vendor code (tab bar), non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: silence shadow* deprecation by using boxShadow on web via Platform.select in shadow.card tokens.
No functional fixes needed for Slice 1 — proceed to Slice 2.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: startup seeder is fully idempotent (delete_many + insert_many) — good for reruns.
All list endpoints project out {_id: 0} — MongoDB ObjectId leakage handled correctly.
Recipes filter accepts optional category & diet params; matches spec.
Frontend uses process.env.EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL — no hardcoded URLs.
All interactive/informational elements have testID (home-screen, counters, category-breakdown, per-tab screens, app-header).
seed_data_creation: None — backend startup seeds from /app/backend/data/*.json into MongoDB (ingredients=69, recipes=67, meal_rules doc=1).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Slice 1 (data load + shell + bottom tabs) is fully green. When Slice 2 lands (Pantry CRUD), reuse /app/backend/tests/test_ammiai_slice1.py as regression and add a new test_pantry.py. Frontend tab testIDs pantry-screen/plan-screen/calendar-screen/grocery-screen exist and can be navigated to via role='button' name=<TabLabel>.
